languages.text: "Служители Омниссии готовы выдвигаться, Ваша Светлость. Отряд включает в себя как скитариев, так и исследователей".
"The servants of the Omnissiah are ready to proceed, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The detachment includes both Skitarii and explorers."
languages.original_text: "Служители Омниссии готовы выдвигаться, Ваша Светлость. Отряд включает в себя как скитариев, так и исследователей".

traits.locale_text: "The servants of the Omnissiah are ready to proceed, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The detachment includes both Skitarii and explorers."
"The servants of the Omnissiah are ready to proceed, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The detachment includes both Skitarii and explorers."
"The servants of the Omnissiah are ready to proceed, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The detachment includes both Skitarii and explorers."

languages.text: 「オムニシアのしもべは、貴方様のお言葉に従って進みます。分遣隊には、スキャタリイと探検隊員が共に含まれています」
languages.original_text: "The servants of the Omnissiah are ready to proceed, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The detachment includes both Skitarii and explorers."

traits.locale_text: オムニシアのしもべは、貴方様のお言葉に従って進みます。分遣隊には、スキャタリイと探検隊員が共に含まれています。

languages.text: «Los siervos del Omnissiah están listos, mi{mf|lord|lady}. El destacamento incluye tanto Skitarii como exploradores».
languages.original_text: "The servants of the Omnissiah are ready to proceed, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The detachment includes both Skitarii and explorers."

traits.locale_text: «Los siervos del Omnissiah están listos, mi{mf|lord|lady}. El destacamento incluye tanto Skitarii como exploradores».

languages.text: “欧姆尼赛亚的仆从已准备就绪，大人。分队中既有护教军，也有探索者。”
languages.original_text: "The servants of the Omnissiah are ready to proceed, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The detachment includes both Skitarii and explorers."

traits.locale_text: “欧姆尼赛亚的仆从已准备就绪，大人。分队中既有护教军，也有探索者。”

languages.text: "Die Diener des Omnissiah stehen bereit, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Die Einheit umfasst Skitarii und Forscher."
languages.original_text: "The servants of the Omnissiah are ready to proceed, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The detachment includes both Skitarii and explorers."

traits.locale_text: "Die Diener des Omnissiah stehen bereit, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Die Einheit umfasst Skitarii und Forscher."

languages.text: "Hermesih'in hizmetkârları ilerlemeye hazır {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Müfreze, hem Skitariusları hem de kâşifleri içeriyor."
languages.original_text: "The servants of the Omnissiah are ready to proceed, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The detachment includes both Skitarii and explorers."

traits.locale_text: "Hermesih'in hizmetkârları ilerlemeye hazır {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Müfreze, hem Skitariusları hem de kâşifleri içeriyor."

languages.text: « Les serviteurs de l'Omnimessie sont prêts, Votre Seigneurie. Le détachement comprend à la fois des skitarii et des explorateurs. »
languages.original_text: "The servants of the Omnissiah are ready to proceed, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The detachment includes both Skitarii and explorers."

traits.locale_text: « Les serviteurs de l'Omnimessie sont prêts, Votre Seigneurie. Le détachement comprend à la fois des skitarii et des explorateurs. »
